---
name: 💡 Feature idea
about: Suggest something new. Tell us the why.
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The idea

What would you like Omni-SAG to do?

## The why

What problem does it solve, or what does it make better? (This is the most important part.)

## How it might work

Rough sketch — UX, config, CLI, whatever you're picturing. Totally fine to be hand-wavy.

## Would it touch a security invariant?

Any thoughts on single-dialer / fail-closed / evidence / secrets / out-of-band? (No worries if not —
we'll figure it out together.)

## Anything else

Links, prior art, alternatives you considered.
